arts.ttl: Should Liverpool prioritise Mo Salah, Trent Alexander-Arnold or Virgil van Dijk contract talks?
arts.sum: With the contract situations of Mo Salah, Trent Alexander-Arnold and Virgil van Dijk all still up in the air, Sports Mole looks at which one Liverpool should prioritise.

arts.ttl: Liverpool to 'finalise' Virgil van Dijk deal after 'agreeing' Ibrahima Konate contract
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly preparing to finalise a new contract for captain Virgil van Dijk once they wrap up fresh terms for fellow defender Ibrahima Konate.

arts.ttl: Liverpool's silence on Mo Salah, Virgil van Dijk and Trent Alexander-Arnold speaks volumes
arts.sum: Liverpool fans are increasingly concerned by the silence from Anfield as Mohamed Salah, Virgil van Dijk and Trent Alexander-Arnold's contracts tick down

arts.ttl: Former Barcelona star reveals his role in convincing Frenkie de Jong to join
arts.sum: Former Barcelona star Eric Abidal has revealed that he played an important role in the club’s signing of midfield standout Frenkie de Jong. De Jong has for his part of…

arts.ttl: 'Everybody in the Netherlands Convinced' Ten Hag has no Man Utd Future
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag is walking on a tightrope at Manchester United and those from his home country feel as though his days are numbered
